training_status: active, returning to fitness after back injury

benefits.description: Severe back pain reduced significantly; was unable to work full day before peptides, now walking around post-surgery with minimal discomfort
Post-surgical recovery dramatically better than expected; no need for prescribed opioids or even Tylenol 24 hours post-op; overall discomfort down ~85% by day 6
Since starting Ipa and tightening diet and fitness regimen, no more back fat

protocol_notes: On BPC and TB on/off for ~3 months (2 cycles) prior to surgery. Loaded up with BPC and TB ~2 weeks ahead of surgery. Reconstitutes with bacteriostatic water, injects subcutaneously into belly fat fasted. Plans to continue current cycle until 6 weeks post-op. Has a biology degree and EMS/paramedic background. Some lingering nagging sciatica at day 6 post-op.
